summary: Classified the five open PRs independently from the hydrated live PR inventory artifact. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed for this shard.

actions.reason: Independent open PR awaiting maintainer review; no close-style action is supported by the artifact.

Independent draft PR with proof/readiness blockers; no close-style action is supported.
Independent maintainer-owned open PR with positive evidence; merge is blocked by job policy and missing required merge preflight, so the safe inventory action is to keep it.
Independent open PR awaiting maintainer review; no close-style action is supported and merge is disallowed.
